description: Add table metadata for tenant, global, and admin table access categories.
Add a tenantDb facade with table, scoped, subquery, tenantJoin, and unscoped entry points.
Preserve createTenantScopedQuery compatibility while sharing alias parsing with the facade.
Export the facade and metadata helpers from @alga-psa/db.
Migrate the first representative app slice from a local tenantScopedTable helper to tenantDb.
Record batch validation and migration progress in /tmp/act-migration.md.
